headline: T-Mobile (TMUS) Announces New Motorola Razr Lineup Featuring AI, 5G Advanced Capabilities
summary: T-Mobile US Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) is one of the cheap NASDAQ stocks to buy right now. On May 21, T-Mobile announced that the new Motorola Razr family (consisting of the Motorola Razr, Razr+, and the all-new Motorola Razr fold) is coming to its network. The devices feature more durable designs, upgraded camera systems, and AI-powered personalization. […]
